text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! Your application for moderator role has been approved. Please review the moderator guidelines in #moderator-resources and reach out if you have any questions.
Welcome @guide_sam! Your application for event_helper role has been approved. Check out #event-planning for upcoming events and resources. Looking forward to your contributions!
Welcome @newbie_kim! Your application has been approved as a community member. Please introduce yourself in #introductions and check out #getting-started for helpful resources.
Welcome @mentor_lina! Your mentor application has been approved. Please join #mentor-lounge and review the mentorship guidelines. Thank you for volunteering to help others!
